ab: Silan cnlalu nya qa blaq na lpyung mu, hiya ga laqi na Tayal uyi.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Silan，他也是泰雅族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Silan, and he is also an Tayal child.

ab: nyan cami glux mqwas biru qa qalang Skikun.
ch: 我們一起在四季部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Skikun tribe.

ab: squn myan mung ke bnheci na tyaba kawas krryax, baq cami kmayal ke Tayal qabax.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說泰雅語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Tayal proficiently.

ab: hlawax cu calay ro mqthoy cu calay uyi, Silan hiya ga mrroq calay ro mhekang calay uyi.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Silan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Silan is short and thin.

ab: Silan hiya ga msuna blaq mqyanux calay, siyan nya hiya qabax ta.
ch: Silan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Silan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
